violations.text: The take-out menu does not have an allergen statement. Marking was contacted to reprint menus during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils the following were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: -can opener -grater -multiple grinder parts. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Chicken broth, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per observation, chicken broth was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer and can opener base have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
Menu board and/or order station does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination in the walk-in. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. PIC relocated foods during inspeciton. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Item taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Cleaned and sanitized containers were observed stored wet and stacked on the wire shelving. Dish washer (employed by facility management) was observed drying dishes with a cloth towel. PICs were informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The drain pipe to the dumps sink on cook line was in poor repair, observed disconnected at the time of inspection. PIC made a temporary connection until maintenance could be contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
